name: NotebookLM Integration Overview
description: NotebookLM skill uses Playwright for browser automation to interact with Google NotebookLM. Requires authentication via Google login. Stores session state in data/browser_state/. Supports notebook library management with metadata (topics, descriptions, tags). Implements response caching and query history tracking.

name: biome-config
description: Biome configuration with Prettier-compatible settings: 2-space indent, single quotes, 100 char width. Ignores dist/, coverage/, .beads/, .sisyphus/

title: Use native NotebookLM RPC for runtime queries and auth
rationale: The recent runtime and command commits replaced the Playwright/browser-pool execution path with a native NotebookLM API client plus CDP-based auth capture. This keeps normal CLI execution lighter and more reliable, while the published command continues to route through a Node wrapper that can prefer a locally compiled Bun binary when available. This decision supersedes the older Playwright-based integration overview.

outcomes.test_results: typecheck, tests, build, npm pack dry-run, wrapper help, fallback help, postinstall compile all passed
